name: productivity-skills
description: Broadly useful productivity workflows for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Broadly useful workflow and maintainer skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle general-purpose productivity and repository-maintenance skills for documentation, accessibility standards, roadmap work, code explanation, and reusable maintainer-toolkit workflows.
defaultPrompt: Install or refresh the repo-maintenance toolkit for this project and explain the local entrypoints.
Explain this code slice in plain language and compare the relevant alternatives.
Help me update the README, AGENTS guidance, accessibility standards, roadmap, or maintainer docs without flattening the existing structure.
